positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical, circular mandala-style illustration depicting celestial flora and cosmic geometry. The central motif features glowing, stylized bioluminescent forest elements (mushrooms, ferns, abstract vines) interwoven with constellations and nebulae patterns. Use a restricted color palette of deep indigo, electric cyan, glowing gold, and black. The composition must be highly contrasted, designed for extreme print clarity on dark fabrics, featuring sharp, clean silhouettes and intricate linework. Stylized graphic art, vector illustration, Zentangle style, high contrast, symmetrical design, mystical, detailed etching, flat graphic style, no photorealism.
negative: photorealistic, blurry, out of focus, bad anatomy, low quality, text, words, logos, watermarks, copyright, artifacts, noise, extra limbs, messy, gradient, solid color block, grainy
